Table of Contents

NAME

SYNOPSIS

DESCRIPTION

Pause is made obsolete by sigpause(3) . The function forces a process to pause until a signal is received from either the function or an interval timer. (See Upon termination of a signal handler started during a the call will return.

RETURN VALUES

Always returns -1.

ERRORS

The function always returns: The call was interrupted.

SEE ALSO

HISTORY

A syscall appeared in
